properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v2 v3 v3 v3 v3 v5 v6 v6 v6 v7 v3 v4 v8 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here is where I lay it down Every burden, every crown This is my surrender This is my surrender

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Here is where I lay it down Every lie and every doubt This is my surrender

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I will make room for You To do whatever You want to To do whatever You want to

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will make room for You To do whatever You want to To do whatever You want to

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Shake up the ground of all my tradition Break down the walls of all my religion

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Your way is better Your way is better Shake up the ground of all my tradition Break down the walls of all my religion

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Your way is better Your way is better

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Here is where I lay it down You are all I'm chasing now This is my surrender This is my surrender
